name: Old School + New School + Praxis-Only Objective Proof
outcome_goal: Take a vague technical objective, produce a concrete implementation and tests, verify them, repair the first failure, and leave an evidence trail from input to final valid output.
anti_requirements: Do not mutate production application code during the proof run.
Do not rely on LLM judgment without deterministic verification.
Do not write demo failures into the canonical Praxis bug table.
Do not use external services or network calls for the generated Stripe webhook proof.

inputs.task_name: autonomous objective build verify repair proof
inputs.task: add a Stripe webhook that updates user status
